---
title: "Graduate Supervison"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
---

### Current Students {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

#### Ph.D Candidate


+ Jiahao Zhao, Jointly with Prof. Kaizhu Huang, 2023 - present


#### M.Sc. Candidate

+ To be update

### Past Students

+ Chenxia Liu, Msc Financial Mathematics, 2022 - 2023

+ Pengyun Zhao, Msc Actuarial Science, 2022 - 2023

+ Lan Wu, Msc Actuarial Science, 2022 - 2023

+ Zhelin Wang, Msc Actuarial Science, 2021 - 2022
